sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76254" key="o)xlomane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀχλο-μᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n76254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be mad after mob popularity</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.603c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
